title: CESL Tender 3 added — 3,604 buses, PM e-Bus Sewa
summary: CESL issued Tender 3 under PM e-Bus Sewa for 3,604 electric buses on GCC model across multiple states. Bid deadline: 7 July 2026.

title: PM E-DRIVE Tender II marked Needs Review — bid deadline passed
summary: Bid deadline for CESL PM E-DRIVE Tender II (2,900 buses) passed on 15 April 2026. No extension or award confirmed. Status updated to Needs Review.

title: Deployment data updated — 18 known city-operator deployments
summary: Known e-bus deployments for 6 OEMs across 18 city-operator pairs updated from public annual reports and press releases. Total known operational: 2,520+ buses.

title: BSE disclosure monitoring active for 5 OEMs
summary: Automated BSE filing monitoring configured for Olectra Greentech, JBM Auto, Tata Motors, Ashok Leyland, and Eicher Motors.

title: CESL tender portal scraped — 2 active tenders confirmed
summary: CESL portal (convergence.co.in/tender) scraped. 2 GCC tenders confirmed: PM e-Bus Sewa Tender 3 (3,604 buses, open) and PM E-DRIVE Tender II (2,900 buses, needs review).
